description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a modern, open floor plan, including multiple rooms arranged around a central living space. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with accents of wood and glass, and the structure includes a spacious patio area with a pergola and a rectangular swimming pool. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the indoor and outdoor spaces. The roof is flat, contributing to the contemporary architectural style, and the property is enclosed by low boundary walls. The backyard area is designed for leisure, featuring a wooden deck and landscaped green patches. The overall design emphasizes functionality, comfort, and seamless integration with outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, white exterior, large windows, a patio, pergola, and swimming pool, designed for open-plan living and outdoor leisure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central living area, and a large tiled patio leading into the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated layout, visible interior rooms, and the swimming pool at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a wooden deck, pergola, and the swimming pool, as well as access to the house through sliding doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side entrance, green patches, and the connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
